name: ollama.dnp.dappnode.eth
shortDescription: Local LLM inference engine with GPU acceleration
description:
Run large language models locally on your DAppNode with GPU acceleration. Ollama provides a fast and efficient LLM inference engine with AMD ROCm support.

**Features:**
- AMD GPU acceleration via ROCm
- Complete privacy - all processing stays local
- Support for multiple LLM models (Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.)

**Requirements:**
- AMD GPU with ROCm support
- At least 8GB RAM (16GB+ recommended)
- Sufficient storage for models (10GB+ recommended)
author: DAppNode Association <admin@dappnode.io> (https://github.com/dappnode)
